Digiquest Institute of Creative Arts and Design provide good facilities all around the campus like Labs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A (Hons.) Game Art and Design - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A good college for both learning and enjoying.

review_content.Placements: About 60-80% of students are placed every year. Approximately Rs.40,000 to Rs.50,000 per month is the average package. There are a lot of companies who can offer jobs for this course. Most of the students do internships according to their job interests. The top roles in our course are 3d modeler, texture artist, developers, 2d artist, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure with proper classrooms. Wi-fi is not available but we can connect to the ethernet connection for the internet. There are no labs in our college, but the library is available with some books. There is no hostel available we have to stay in private hostels.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A.(Hons.) in Multimedia, Animation and VFX - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure, but the process of course learning should be fast.

review_content.Placements: We had joined in this college in 2018 in animation and VFX. Almost 90% of the students from our course got placed. I don't know about salary packages offered because placements are not conducted until now. Top recruiting companies for our course are Makuta, Firefly, Prime Focus and Prana. Top roles offered in our course are 2D artist, Rotomaker, compositor, 3D artist and VFX designer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms in our college are well maintained with all the equipment. I don't find any Wi-Fi facility in our college. There are enough systems for all the students if any student doesn't bring their own laptops. I am a day scholar, so I don't know about the hostel facility.

review_content.Placements: During our college times, few students got placed. When I had joined campus, it was the 3rd session of the campus. During our entire course, I had hardly heard about any company which had come for the placement process.
